source.note: real seeded app via apps-container + reverse tunnel; deterministic container grade

task.en: Open HooliShop, the online shopping app at http://localhost:3010 (it is already open in Safari and you are logged in). Order 2 units of the Cast Iron Skillet 12" and check out, shipping the order to your Office address (Dunder Mifflin, 1725 Slough Ave, Suite 200, Scranton).
